mentions.note: CEO Patti Poppe: data centers reduce electricity costs in California; every gigawatt reduces rates 1%+ due to scale economics.

Q1 beat; lowered CA residential rates 23% (vulnerable customers) while maintaining growth; 4.5 GW data center demand in final engineering, 10+ GW pre-application; serves AWS, Google Cloud, Microsoft; fifth year of double-digit earnings growth with rate reductions; single-issue stock on wildfire liability reform; deserves $25, not $17.
